sections.label: Hero Subtitle
sections.value: Sacred practices and safety guidelines for psilocybin ceremonies

sections.label: Introduction Paragraph 1
sections.value: Psilocybin ceremonies involve the intentional use of psilocybin Sacraments after preparation and meditation on an intent for the experience. These ceremonies allow individuals to access sources of knowledge and wisdom that may be otherwise inaccessible. Through the direct mystical experiences that can occur during ceremony, individuals may gain insight into their spiritual journey, their faith, and their life's purpose.

sections.label: Introduction Paragraph 2
sections.value: Those seeking a psilocybin experience may have questions for God, a sense of searching for meaning, a longing for completeness, or a desire to connect to something more. Many come with big life questions tugging at their hearts, spirits, minds, and bodies. The wisdom and spiritual insights that can be gained through these direct mystical experiences are innumerable and hold an unquantifiable potential for inducing positive transformation.

sections.label: Safety Warning
sections.value: It is imperative that all safety and dosage information is thoroughly read and understood. Never attempt to consume psilocybin without careful preparation and adherence to safety guidelines.

value.title: Understand traditional vs. Per-Ankh calculator dosing
Consult with physician if on medications
What is my purpose on earth?
How do I learn to be more patient?
What are my God given gifts? How do I use them?
How do I heal my body?
Introduce me to my guardian angels

sections.label: Intent Description
sections.value: Maintaining a clear and sincere focus upon the intent before, during, and after each ceremony is helpful for numerous reasons. Focusing on the intent for a psilocybin ceremony sets the stage for a focused mindset, presents your inquiry or request to the divine, and serves as an anchor during potential difficulties that may arise.
